title: Credit with bank or depositary, meaning of
doc_html:
§23.  Credit with bank or depositary, meaning of

The words "credit with the drawee bank or other depositary", as used in R.S. 21:21 shall be construed to mean an arrangement or understanding with the bank or other depositary for the payment of the check, draft or order.
doc_text:
§23.  Credit with bank or depositary, meaning of
The words "credit with the drawee bank or other depositary", as used in R.S. 21:21 shall be construed to mean an arrangement or understanding with the bank or other depositary for the payment of the check, draft or order.
